description: Letter from Isma'il b. Yosef b. Abi Aqaba, Damsis (Egypt), to his mother's brother Yusuf b. Awkal, first quarter of the 11th century. Ed. S. D. Goitein, 'The Jewish trade in the Mediterranean Sea at the beginning of the 11th century' (Hebrew), Tarbiz, 37(1968), p. 166. Also ed. Gil, Ishamel, doc. 214
